landing.hero: Learn languages with a real voice conversation partner
landing.feature1Desc: Level assessment + weekly plan from A1 to C2. Lessons unlocked in order, at your own pace.
landing.feature2Desc: Practice with lessons, exercises and flashcards guided by your tutor. Feedback at every step.
landing.feature3Desc: Talk to your tutor in real time. Voice-activated, instant response, no turn-taking.
landing.feature4Desc: AI-generated exercises at your CEFR level. Listen to a passage, answer 5 comprehension questions and unlock the transcript — or read a text and answer questions directly. New exercises on demand.
landing.feature5Desc: Vocabulary review with spaced repetition. The SM-2 algorithm schedules each card at the optimal moment to maximise long-term retention.
landing.feature6Desc: XP, daily streaks, skill scores and unit competencies. Track your growth week by week and test your level at the end of each CEFR stage.
landing.footer: Open source · Self-host free or subscribe to the hosted service

terms.s1Body: FreeLingo is an open-source AI-powered language learning platform available in two modes: (1) self-hosted, where you run it on your own infrastructure at no cost, and (2) as a hosted service operated by the FreeLingo team, available via paid subscription. By using this service in either mode, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.s2Intro: You may use FreeLingo solely for personal language learning purposes. You agree not to:
terms.s2i1: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system.
terms.s2i2: Upload malicious content or attempt to disrupt the service.
terms.s2i3: Share your account credentials with third parties.
terms.s2i4: Use automated scripts or bots to abuse the AI tutoring features.
terms.s3Body: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account and use FreeLingo. By registering, you confirm that you meet this age requirement. If we become aware that an account belongs to a person under 16, we will delete it and all associated data without notice. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity under your account. The operator of the instance — yourself for self-hosted deployments, or the FreeLingo team for the hosted service — may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4Body: Conversations with the AI tutor are stored in the database for learning continuity. In the hosted service, AI chat and voice features are processed via OpenAI's API and your content is subject to OpenAI's usage policies. The AI may produce inaccurate responses — always apply your own judgement. FreeLingo is not responsible for content generated by underlying language models. The content generated by the AI tutor (exercises, corrections, explanations, and other materials) belongs to you for your personal use. FreeLingo does not claim ownership over your conversations or the content generated from them.
terms.s5Body: Self-hosted deployments are free and the operator retains full control over their data and infrastructure. The hosted service operated by the FreeLingo team is provided via paid subscription, available on a monthly or yearly basis. In the hosted service your data is stored on servers operated by the FreeLingo team. The hosted service applies usage limits to AI tutoring features; your current usage is available in account settings.
terms.s6Body: Subscriptions are available on a monthly or yearly billing cycle and renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. New subscribers receive a free trial period (payment details required to start; no charge is made until the trial ends). You may cancel at any time from your account settings, effective at the end of the current billing period. If you cancel within 14 days of your first subscription payment and have not meaningfully used the service, you may request a full refund under EU consumer law. No partial refunds are issued for unused time beyond this statutory right. Current subscription prices are displayed at checkout.
terms.s7Body: This service is provided without uptime guarantees. The operator may suspend or discontinue the service for maintenance, updates, or any other reason, with reasonable notice where possible.
terms.s8Body: FreeLingo and its contributors are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, this service. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the three months preceding the claim. You agree to indemnify and hold harmless FreeLingo and its contributors from any third-party claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the service in violation of these terms.
terms.s9Body: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Spain, unless mandatory consumer protection law in your country of residence provides otherwise.
terms.s10Body: These terms may be updated at any time. We will notify users of material changes via the service interface. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.s11Body: If any provision of these terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, that provision will be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary and the remaining provisions will remain in full force and effect.
terms.linkContact: For questions about these terms, contact us at contacto@arturocarreterocalvo.com.

privacy.s1Body: FreeLingo is available as a self-hosted application and as a hosted service. For self-hosted deployments, all data is stored exclusively on the operator's server and the FreeLingo project authors have no access to it. For the hosted service, the FreeLingo team acts as the data controller and this policy describes how your personal data is collected, used, and protected.
privacy.s2Intro: FreeLingo is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16 years of age. If you are under 16, do not create an account or provide any personal data. When you create an account and use FreeLingo, the following data is stored:
privacy.s2i1: Username, display name, and email address.
privacy.s2i2: Hashed password (bcrypt — your plain-text password is never stored).
privacy.s2i3: Native language preference and learning settings.
privacy.s2i5: Chat and conversation history with the AI tutor.
privacy.s2i6: Flashcard decks, study progress, and spaced-repetition data.
privacy.s2i8: Subscription status, plan type, and Stripe customer identifier (for paid service subscribers).
privacy.s2i9: Memories and preferences the AI tutor learns about you during conversations to personalize future interactions.
privacy.s2i10: Feature requests, bug reports, comments, and votes you submit through the feedback board. Only your username is shown publicly; all users can see published suggestions and reports.
privacy.s3Intro: Your data is used exclusively to provide the FreeLingo learning experience:
privacy.s3i1: Authenticating you and maintaining your session.
privacy.s3i2: Personalizing your study plan and tutor interactions.
privacy.s3i3: Tracking your learning progress over time.
privacy.s3i5: Remembering your preferences and context so the AI tutor can offer you more personalized interactions.
privacy.s3i6: Displaying and managing community feature requests and bug reports.
privacy.s3Footer: Your data is never sold, rented, or shared with third-party marketing services.
privacy.s4Body: In the hosted service, AI chat, voice synthesis (TTS), and voice transcription (STT) are provided via OpenAI's API. Your conversation content and audio are sent to OpenAI for processing, subject to OpenAI's Privacy Policy (openai.com/privacy). Payment processing is handled by Stripe, Inc. (USA); Stripe processes payment data directly and we do not store payment card details on our servers — your transaction data is subject to Stripe's Privacy Policy (stripe.com/privacy). For self-hosted deployments, the operator chooses the AI provider; by default a local Ollama instance is used and no data leaves the server.
privacy.s5Body: FreeLingo uses two technical cookies strictly necessary for the service to function: a refresh_token (httpOnly, 30-day expiry) used for session authentication, and NEXT_LOCALE (1-year expiry) to remember your language preference. No tracking or advertising cookies are used. For anonymous traffic measurement, we use Umami — a self-hosted, open-source analytics tool that does not use cookies, collects no personal data, and keeps all data on our servers.
privacy.s6Body: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your account and all associated data (available directly from the Settings page); object to processing; and request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at the address in section 8 or delete your account directly from Settings. Legal basis for processing (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): we process your personal data because it is necessary for the performance of the contract between you and us — providing the FreeLingo learning service. International transfers: when using the hosted service, your conversation content and audio may be processed by OpenAI, Inc. (USA), and payment data is processed by Stripe, Inc. (USA). These transfers are carried out under the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission (Art. 46 GDPR), ensuring an adequate level of protection. Right to lodge a complaint: you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD — aepd.es) or with the supervisory authority in your country of residence.
privacy.s7Body: Your data is retained for as long as your account exists. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time from the Settings page. Deletion is immediate and irreversible.
privacy.s8Body: For privacy-related concerns about the hosted service, contact us at: contacto@arturocarreterocalvo.com. For self-hosted deployments, contact the administrator of the instance you are using. For questions about the FreeLingo open-source project, visit the project repository on GitHub.
privacy.s9Body: If any provision of this policy is found to be invalid or unenforceable, that provision will be limited to the minimum extent necessary and the remaining provisions will remain in full force and effect.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a_start: Start with the Assessment. It detects your English level (A1–C2) and your strengths and weaknesses. With that result you can generate a personalized Study Plan that fills your Dashboard with daily lessons. Without the Assessment, the Dashboard is empty.
faq.workflowStep1: Register and select your native language
faq.workflowStep2: Take the Assessment → your CEFR level is detected
faq.workflowStep3: Generate your Study Plan from the Dashboard
faq.workflowStep4: Complete your daily lessons (START button in the Dashboard)
faq.workflowStep5: Use Flashcards to train vocabulary in parallel
faq.workflowStep6: Practice free conversation with the AI Tutor
faq.a_language: FreeLingo currently supports several languages (American English, British English, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Mainland Chinese, Portuguese, Spanish), and we will keep adding more over time. When a new language becomes available, you will find it in Settings → My Languages — add it and start learning right away.
faq.a_assessment: A 15-question AI-generated test covering grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and sentence transformation, with difficulty ranging from A1 to C1. When you finish, you get your CEFR level, a score, and an analysis of your strengths and weaknesses. This result feeds into the Study Plan and generated Flashcards.
faq.q_studyPlan: What is the Study Plan and how do I generate one?
faq.a_studyPlan: After the Assessment, go to the Dashboard and click Generate Study Plan. A week-by-week plan with daily lessons tailored to your CEFR level and goals will be created automatically. Each lesson includes multiple-choice and free-writing exercises evaluated by AI.
faq.a_resources: The Resources section brings together reference material that is independent from your Study Plan: grammar by level, vocabulary sets, and useful phrases. You can use it anytime to review, look up explanations, or expand your vocabulary without waiting for a daily lesson.
faq.a_flashcards: A vocabulary training system using the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm. Generate cards on any topic (e.g. "business", "phrasal verbs", "food") with a definition, example sentence, and translation into your native language. The system calculates when to show each card again just before you forget it. Completely independent from the Study Plan.
faq.q_vocabulary: How do I add words to my vocabulary?
faq.a_vocabulary: You can save words in two ways: (1) While reading a lesson, listening exercise, or chatting with the tutor, highlight any word with your mouse and click Save in the tooltip that appears — the AI will generate a definition, example sentence, and translation into your native language. (2) Go to Vocabulary, open a vocabulary set for your level, and click Add All to import the whole set at once. Your saved words appear in My Vocabulary under the Flashcards section.
faq.q_tutor: How does the AI Tutor work?
faq.a_tutor: A free-form streaming chat. The tutor knows your CEFR level and weak points to tailor its responses. Ask grammar questions, request explanations, practice writing in English, or just have a conversation. Conversations are saved and accessible from the sidebar across sessions.
faq.q_voice: How does the voice conversation work?
faq.a_voice: The Voice Conversation mode lets you speak with the AI tutor in real time. Press Start to begin — the app listens for your voice automatically using voice activity detection (VAD) and the tutor replies with synthesised speech. You can interrupt the tutor at any moment (barge-in). The session ends when you reach the time limit or press Stop. Make sure your browser has microphone permission enabled.
faq.a_listening: The Listening section generates short audio passages at your CEFR level, voiced by AI. Listen to the audio, then answer 5 comprehension questions. After submitting, you get your score (0–5), XP, correct answers, and the full transcript. You can generate new exercises on demand.
faq.a_reading: The Reading section generates texts at your CEFR level — notices, emails, articles, blog posts, and more. Read the passage and answer 5 multiple-choice questions. After submitting, you get your score (0–5) and XP. New exercises can be generated on demand.
faq.q_providers: Which AI providers does FreeLingo support?
faq.provider_ollama: Local, free. Requires Ollama running on the host. Recommended model: gemma4:e4b. May be slow without a GPU.
faq.provider_openai: OpenAI API (GPT-4o, etc.). Fast and reliable. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.
faq.a_invite: Yes. From Admin → Users the admin can create users directly or generate single-use invite links that expire in 48 hours. Public registration is disabled by default (ALLOW_REGISTRATION=false).
faq.q_password: How do I change my password or native language?
faq.a_password: Go to <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink>. You can update your display name, native language, and password from there.
faq.q_uiLanguage: How do I change the platform language?
faq.a_uiLanguage: Go to Settings and find the Platform language dropdown in the Profile section. Select your preferred language and the entire interface will switch immediately.
faq.q_feedback: How do I suggest a new feature or report a bug?
faq.a_feedback: Use the <feedbackLink>Feedback</feedbackLink> section in the sidebar. You can create suggestions for new features or report bugs. Vote on other users' ideas, leave comments, and track the status of each request. All submissions are public and are reviewed by the admin.

step1.label: Welcome
step1.title: Welcome to FreeLingo
step1.desc: FreeLingo is your AI-powered language tutor. Practice at your own pace, at any time, through conversation, lessons, and smart flashcards.

step2.label: Text chat
step2.title: Chat with your tutor
step2.desc: Have written conversations with your AI tutor. Ask questions, get corrections, and practise grammar and vocabulary in a natural way.

step3.label: Voice
step3.title: Speak in real time
step3.desc: Use voice conversation mode to practise your spoken language with real-time transcription and instant feedback on your pronunciation.

step4.label: Flashcards
step4.title: Never forget a word
step4.desc: Flashcards use the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm so you review words exactly when you're about to forget them — maximising retention.

step5.label: Study plan
step5.title: Your personalised plan
step5.desc: Based on your level assessment, FreeLingo builds a structured study plan with daily lessons adapted to your goals and progress.

step6.label: Practice
step6.title: Listening & Reading
step6.desc: Test your comprehension with AI-generated exercises. Listen to a passage and answer 5 questions, or read a text at your CEFR level — earn XP for every correct answer.

step7.label: Ready
step7.title: You're all set!
step7.desc: Start with today's lesson, open a chat, practise listening or reading — FreeLingo adapts to how you like to learn.

entry1.label: Unread feedback notifications
entry1.desc: Feedback now shows a small unread counter in the sidebar, so you can spot new suggestions, bug reports, and replies without extra emails. Opening a feedback thread marks just that thread as read.

entry2.label: Free voice trial after assessment
entry2.desc: After creating your study plan, you can try a real-time voice conversation with Lingu for 5 minutes, free. When the demo ends, Premium unlocks full voice practice and the other guided modes.

entry3.label: Bug fixes
entry3.desc: Various minor bug fixes and stability improvements across the platform.
